title: Vera's Atacicept Wins FDA Approval for IgAN
headline: Vera Therapeutics scores FDA accelerated approval for TRUTAKNA (atacicept-vymj) in IgA nephropathy with ~42% placebo-adjusted proteinuria reduction, kicking off competition with Otsuka.
key_facts: TRUTAKNA (atacicept-vymj); dual BAFF/APRIL inhibitor; accelerated approval July 7, 2026; 42% placebo-adjusted proteinuria reduction (ORIGIN 3 trial), p<0.0001; weekly subcutaneous dosing; confirmatory eGFR readout expected Q3 2026

title: Otsuka VOYXACT Sets IgAN Competitive Bar
headline: Otsuka's VOYXACT (sibeprenlimab-szsi), approved November 2025, shows 51% placebo-adjusted proteinuria reduction with monthly dosing and completed confirmatory 2-year eGFR data.
key_facts: VOYXACT (sibeprenlimab-szsi); APRIL inhibitor; approved November 2025; 51% placebo-adjusted proteinuria reduction (VISIONARY trial), p<0.0001; monthly subcutaneous dosing; positive confirmatory 2-year eGFR data completed

title: Oberland Capital Commits $400M to MeiraGTx
headline: Oberland Capital commits up to $400 million in non-dilutive financing ($375M capped royalty + $25M equity) to fund MeiraGTx eye gene therapies including reacquired bota-vec.
key_facts: Total $400 million ($375M non-dilutive capped royalty + $25M equity); contingent on regulatory approval; assets include AAV2-hAQP1 and botaretigene sparoparvovec (bota-vec); reacquired from J&J; announced July 7, 2026

title: Bristol Myers Squibb Krazati Confirmatory Fail
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb reports confirmatory trial failure for Krazati (adagrasib) in colorectal cancer.
key_facts: Krazati (adagrasib); KRAS G12C inhibitor; colorectal cancer confirmatory trial failure

title: AbbVie/Genmab Epkinly EU Expansion
headline: AbbVie and Genmab's bispecific antibody Epkinly wins expanded indication in European Union.
key_facts: Epkinly; bispecific antibody; EU expansion approval; July 7, 2026

title: Novartis Cuts 322 US Headquarters Staff
headline: Novartis dismisses 322 additional employees at its US headquarters as part of ongoing restructuring.

title: Tanabe Sells 17 Medicines & Manufacturing Unit to Towa
headline: Tanabe divests rights to 17 medicines and one manufacturing unit to Towa Pharmaceutical.

title: Teva Repigmentation Phase 1b Data
headline: Teva reports Phase 1b skin repigmentation data with Phase 2b trial planned for Q4 2026; stock down 1.66% at $34.70.
key_facts: Phase 1b repigmentation data; Phase 2b planned Q4 2026; Teva stock down 1.66% at $34.70; July 7, 2026

title: CMS Proposes 340B Program Cuts
headline: CMS proposes cuts to the 340B drug discount program; Tampa General initiates legal challenge against Eli Lilly's 340B restrictions.
key_facts: 340B program policy debate; Tampa General v. Eli Lilly legal action; July 7, 2026

title: Scribe Therapeutics IPO Filing (S-1 Pending)
headline: Scribe Therapeutics files S-1 for IPO (ticker SCTX) with estimated $75M raise and $180M in Sanofi/Eli Lilly partnership payments; no pricing date as of July 7.
key_facts: S-1 filed July 5; ticker SCTX; estimated $75M Renaissance Capital; $180M Sanofi/Eli Lilly partnerships; collaborations with Biogen, Sanofi, Eli Lilly; ~14th biotech IPO of 2026; no pricing date July 7
